Title: st_contains
Description: Returns true if all points of a given geometry g2 are in another geometry g1.

Returns true if all points of a given geometry g2 are in another geometry g1.
If prec is supplied, this is a tolerance for the matching in units of linear distance
appropriate to the srid. Both geometries should have the same srid.
Examples:
SQL>SPARQL
SELECT ?c COUNT (*)
WHERE
  {
    ?m geo:geometry ?geo .
    ?m a ?c .
    FILTER (bif:st_contains (?geo, bif:st_point (0, 52)))
  }
GROUP BY ?c ?geo
ORDER BY DESC 2;
c                                                                     callret-1
ANY                                                                   ANY
